channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cruise ship evacuates 3 due to suspected hantavirus
item.description: Health officials investigate a potential outbreak after three passengers were evacuated. A case was also confirmed in a former passenger.

item.title: Student Arrested After Attack at Brazilian School
item.description: Authorities report a 13-year-old student is accused of an attack at Instituto Sao Jose in Rio Branco.

item.title: Iran live updates: Pakistan PM thanks Trump for pausing ship escorts
item.description: President Trump announced Project Freedom on Sunday, stating the Navy would ensure ships safely navigate restricted waters.

item.title: Nancy Mace Claims Records of Congressional Misconduct Fund
item.description: Representative Nancy Mace disclosed records related to a congressional fund addressing sexual misconduct claims, naming eight former members.
